scripts.dev: echo 'Run both in separate terminals: bun run dev:backend | bun run dev:frontend'
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && echo 'Backend: no build needed'
scripts.install:all: bun install && cd frontend && bun install && cd ../backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.test: bun run test:frontend && cd backend && pytest -x
scripts.start: echo 'Run both in separate terminals: bun run start:backend | bun run start:frontend'
